taxonomy.sub_category: CalWave Hydronode data coming soon Updated on February 5, 2024 · Created on December 10, 2021 CalWave Hydronode Data Coming Soon Wave powered water desalination system Developed By CalWave Tested By CalWave Hydronode Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Data Coming Soon Product Description The CalWave Hydronode operates using a single power-take-off (PTO) and surface piercing point absorber to utilize wave energy to desalinate seawater. The system uses a commercial-off-the-shelf reverse osmosis unit and was designed to be small for rapid deployment while also allowing for the potential to scale. The system can provide fresh water for off-grid applications using wave energy for remote and rural communities. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 7: Affordable and Clean Energy Target Users (Target Impact Group) Distributors / Implementing Organizations Unknown Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Aqua-life Desalination module , BlueBox RO DS , Aero-Desalinator , Desolenator , Eliodomestico Solar Water Distiller , and Slingshot .
